About Me

Designing with passion & precision

2+Years Exp.
Projects Delivered
99+ ✦

I'm Birendranath Manna, a passionate graphic designer with 2+ years of professional experience helping businesses stand out visually. From logos and banners to full social media campaigns, I bring ideas to life with precision and creativity.

I have worked across a wide range of industries including Education, Real Estate, Healthcare, Restaurants, Food & Beverage, Resorts, Construction, Optics, Furniture, Technology, Events & Parties, and Grocery Stores — delivering designs that not only look visually appealing but also communicate effectively, engage audiences, and drive results.
